name: Best-Ever Gingersnaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup sugar, flour, salt, soda, and spices in a bowl; stir lightly.
2. Cut in shortening to resemble coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in molasses and egg until combined.
4. Shape dough into 1-inch balls, and roll them in sugar.
5. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
7. Remove from baking sheets immediately. Cookies will firm quickly as they cool.
